meaning: adj.冻结成冰的,受到冰河作用的
examples: Approximately 10% of the island is glaciated.
Alice and Bessie found themselves climbing the highest glaciated peak in Italy.
A mostly cold and barren world of steppes and tundra, with vast frozen regions and glaciated mountain ranges.
The glaciated peaks stand opposite, slowly turning orange as the sun sets, while in the morning the sun rises sharply from behind their jagged ridges.
Images of Titan were also compared with regions on Earth, including volcanic terrain on the island of Kauai and recently glaciated landscapes in North America.
